arts.ttl: Nagelsmann speaks on possibility of remaining Germany coach beyond 2026
arts.sum: At a press conference on Sunday, Julian Nagelsmann was asked if he could see himself extending his contract as Germany coach.

arts.ttl: Angelino Stiller set for first Germany start on Monday
arts.sum: Julian Nagelsmann revealed in the press conference hosted alongside Antonio Rüdiger ahead of the Netherlands game on Monday that Angelino Stiller with start alongside Aleksandar Pavlović on Sunday in midfield.

arts.ttl: Pavlovic in contention to start against Netherlands after returning from injury
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlovic is a candidate for Germany's starting eleven against the Netherlands after making his return to full training.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed double boost ahead of Chelsea clash with Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk to return early
arts.sum: Salah and van Dijk have both been released from international duty and will return to Liverpool from the start of next week

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich the contrarian: Bayern Munich midfielder fine playing more and more matches
arts.sum: Ironically, last season, Manchester City manager and former Bayern coach Pep Guardiola suggested that a strike might be a good option to address the increasing fixture congestion. Kimmich is not opposed to the increased fixture congestion for both club and country matches.
